basic_details.job_title: CBHFL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Cent Bank Home Finance Limited (CBHFL) has released the official Chief Financial Officer Notification 2026 on 06 June 2026 at www.cbhfl.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the CBHFL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years (relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC) with a qualification of Chartered Accountant from a recognized institution and basic knowledge of computer applications, including Advanced Excel, can apply offline by 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 45 years (relaxation by 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant from recognized Institution. Basic Knowledge of computer applications including knowledge of Advance Excel.
qualification.details: Chartered Accountant from recognized Institution. Basic Knowledge of computer applications including knowledge of Advance Excel. Minimum experience of 15 years, including at least 3 years in a Senior Managerial Position in the field of finance, accounting, taxation, audit, and financial management, in Banks/Financial Institutions / NBFCs /Housing Finance Companies. Experience in Housing Finance / NBFC sector shall be preferred. Strong exposure to: Financial reporting (Ind AS), Regulatory compliance (NHB/RBI), Treasury & ALM management, Budgeting & financial planning, Taxation (Direct & Indirect – GST). Experience in dealing with: Statutory Auditors / Internal Auditors, Regulatory inspections (NHB/RBI/CAG). Management Trainee/Internship period will not be considered as count of experience.

salary_details.details: CTC offer to the selected candidate shall be determined based on the Candidates qualification, experience and current CTC form the existing Employer ensuring prudent and reasonable fit within the Company's compensation structure & Industry structure. Annual increment applicable as per Company's Policy.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.cbhfl.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CBHFL Chief Financial Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt and submission of the application for the Chief Financial Officer post at Cent Bank Home Finance Limited is 06-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required qualification for the Chief Financial Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Chartered Accountants from a recognized institution and possess basic knowledge of computer applications, including Advance Excel.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years, with relaxations available for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years) categories.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Chief Financial Officer role at CBHFL?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by filling out the application form and sending it along with a Demand Draft to the specified corporate office address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the CBHFL Chief Financial Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 500/- for SC/ST/PWD/EWS candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Chief Financial Officer position at Cent Bank Home Finance Limited.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum experience required for the CFO role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 15 years of experience is required, with at least 3 years in a Senior Managerial Position in finance-related fields within Banks or Financial Institutions.

faq.question: Q8. Which mode of application is accepted for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Cent Bank Home Finance Limited?
faq.answer: The official website of Cent Bank Home Finance Limited is www.cbhfl.com.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Chief Financial Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Chief Financial Officer post will be based on an Interview.
